action: Bind each OIDC temporal calibration measurement contract to exact collector and workflow invocation provenance before comparability analysis.

progress.finding: A calibration contract must be digest-bound to exact collector source, workflow source, and invocation identity before its aggregate cohort may enter the R-011 comparability gate.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

handoff: Cloudflare Research should require this provenance result before R-011 comparability, then run R-010 drift detection only for cohorts whose contract provenance and comparability both pass. Signature verification and authenticated source acquisition remain separate mandatory controls.
